stories.h: Microsoft makes Copilot a system-level agent across all of Windows
stories.s: The OS itself is now an agent runtime — apps become tools the assistant orchestrates.
b: Copilot can operate any application with user-granted permissions.
IT admins get full audit logs of agent actions.
Security researchers immediately began probing the permission model.

stories.h: DeepSeek V4 matches frontier benchmarks at a tenth of the price
stories.s: The efficiency lab does it again — pricing pressure on every closed API just intensified.
b: $0.40 per million output tokens, undercutting everyone.
Trained on a fraction of the compute of Western peers.
US lawmakers renewed calls for open-weight export scrutiny.

stories.h: NIST releases the first federal standard for evaluating AI agents
stories.s: A common yardstick for "is this agent safe to deploy?" — procurement teams will use it immediately.
b: Covers autonomy levels, failure containment, and audit requirements.
Federal agencies must apply it to purchases starting 2027.
Labs helped draft it; critics say that's the problem.

stories.h: Amazon crosses one million warehouse robots
stories.s: Robots now roughly match human headcount in fulfillment — the automation curve is compounding.
b: Robot fleet grew 40% in twelve months.
New units handle irregular items previously needing hands.

stories.h: AI-designed enzymes work on first synthesis, Nature reports
stories.s: Generative biology is moving from predicting proteins to inventing useful ones.
b: Novel enzymes catalyze reactions with no natural counterpart.
Potential applications in plastic degradation and drug synthesis.

stories.h: Safe Superintelligence raises again at a $60B valuation
stories.s: Still no product, still no demos — the purest bet in AI keeps finding believers.
b: Sutskever says commercialization remains explicitly off the table.

stories.h: EU and US announce joint AI safety-testing pact
stories.s: The safety institutes will share evals and red-team results — quiet but meaningful coordination.
b: Joint testing of frontier models before major releases.
China invited to observer status; no response yet.

stories.h: YC: 80% of the new batch is building AI agents
stories.s: Peak agent? The startup ecosystem has gone all-in on one thesis.
b: Partners say vertical agents for boring industries dominate.
